summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel features, Notification Scheduler, and Schedule from DB completed. All 19 backend tests passed. Admin panel UI fully functional with login, dashboard stats, schedule CRUD, bookings management, and users list. Notification scheduler confirmed running with day-before and inactivity reminder jobs.

minor.issue: Warning about bcrypt version attribute (AttributeError: module 'bcrypt' has no attribute '__about__')
minor.impact: None - bcrypt still works correctly, just a version detection warning

passed_tests: Admin login at /admin/login with credentials admin@linea.ba / admin123 - WORKING
Admin dashboard at /admin showing stats (10 users, 10 memberships, 0 today's trainings, 19 total bookings) - WORKING
Admin schedule management at /admin/raspored with 265 slot cards displayed - WORKING
Admin schedule CRUD: create slot, delete slot, generate week - ALL WORKING
Admin bookings page at /admin/rezervacije with search and status filter - WORKING
Admin users page at /admin/korisnici showing user list with search - WORKING
Booking cancellation endpoint exists and validates 12h rule - WORKING
GET /api/schedule returns DB-stored slots (240+ slots for 30 days) - WORKING
Schedule has multiple days of data (seeded from MongoDB) - WORKING
User-facing schedule page at /termini requires authentication - WORKING
Notification scheduler running with check_day_before_reminders (hourly) - CONFIRMED
Notification scheduler running with check_inactivity_reminders (every 6 hours) - CONFIRMED
Login page logo rendering at /login - WORKING
Phone auth flow with OTP mock code 123456 - WORKING
All admin navigation (Kontrolna tabla, Raspored, Rezervacije, Korisnici) - WORKING
Admin dark theme UI properly styled - WORKING
All text in Bosnian language - CONFIRMED
critical_code_review_comments: bcrypt version warning in passlib - cosmetic issue, no action needed
Admin panel properly validates 12h cancellation rule before allowing booking cancellation
Schedule slots are correctly seeded on startup (240 slots for 30 days)
Notification scheduler jobs properly configured with APScheduler AsyncIOScheduler

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All admin panel features working, login page working)

test_credentials.phone_otp: Any phone number, OTP code is always 123456

seed_data_creation: Admin user and 240 schedule slots seeded on backend startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully tested and working. All CRUD operations for schedule slots verified. Notification scheduler confirmed running. Phone OTP is MOCKED (always 123456). Schedule data comes from MongoDB (seeded 240 slots for 30 days). The 12h booking cancellation rule is enforced by the backend.
